channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government and academia partner to advance sustainable electricity solutions in South Africa
item.description: Electricity and Energy Deputy Minister Alexandra Abrahams engaged with the University of Cape Town’s Power Futures Lab to assess South Africa’s electricity sector and identify pathways for long-term s...

item.title: Serbian Entrepreneur Survives Near-Disaster on Ryanair Flight, Credits Luck and Passenger Aid
item.description: Ljubisa Karović, a 61-year-old Serbian entrepreneur, survived a harrowing incident on a Ryanair flight from Greece to Germany. The incident occurred when a window shattered mid-flight, nearly sucking ...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Analysis of Feng Shui Trends for July 22, 2026
item.description: The article discusses Feng Shui predictions by Master Hanz Cua for July 22, 2026, focusing on energy flows and auspicious directions. It highlights how specific dates and times can influence personal ...

item.title: Canada Cancels Cross-Border Celebrations for Gordie Howe Bridge Opening Amid Tariff Tensions
item.description: The Canadian government has decided not to participate in cross-border celebrations marking the opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge due to ongoing trade tensions with the United States. Th...

item.title: Tanzania Simplifies Manufacturing Regulations to Boost Local Production
item.description: The Tanzanian government has launched a streamlined system aimed at reducing bureaucratic hurdles for local manufacturers. This initiative, announced during a recent briefing, seeks to cut processing ...

item.title: Pentagon seeks billions to fund escalating Iran-US conflict amid Senate scrutiny and rising casualties
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth testified before the Senate Appropriations Committee, revealing the war with Iran has cost at least $37.5 billion. The administration is requesting an additional $67 ...

item.title: EL-Lab Maintains ISO 15189:2022 Accreditation, Reinforces Trust in Lagos Healthcare
item.description: EL-Lab Medical Diagnostics and Research Centre, a leading medical diagnostic center in Lagos, has successfully retained its ISO 15189:2022 accreditation from the Nigeria National Accreditation System ...

item.title: Community Efforts Continue in Search for Missing Calgary Boy
item.description: An 11-year-old Calgary boy named Parker, who is neurodivergent and non-verbal, went missing from his dayhome on July 16. His family expressed gratitude for the community's support during a search that...

item.title: Delta commissioner emotional during swearing-in as governor stops him from kneeling
item.description: Delta State Commissioner Moses Ogodo became overwhelmed with emotion during his swearing-in ceremony at Government House, Asaba, breaking down in tears and attempting to kneel before Governor Sheriff ...

item.title: Modi Government Appoints Sikh Leader to Head Minorities Panel
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government has appointed Hardeep Singh Puri, a senior BJP leader and former foreign secretary, as the new head of the National Commission for Religious and Linguistic Mi...

item.title: 16-year-old faces court after stabbing mother and sister in Perth
item.description: A 16-year-old boy has been charged with murder following a fatal stabbing incident in Bentley, Perth. The teenager allegedly killed his 35-year-old mother and seriously injured his 12-year-old sister ...

item.title: Nigel Farage's public appearance and political remarks amid financial scrutiny
item.description: Nigel Farage made a rare public appearance at a private event in Norfolk, delivering a speech to a small group of supporters while avoiding media scrutiny. The event, held at Kimberley Hall, marked a ...

item.title: Bonteheuwel Shopkeeper Murder: Charges Dropped Against Four Suspects Amid Evidence Shortfalls
item.description: A spaza shop owner named Umar was murdered on 13 July in Bonteheuwel, with CCTV footage revealing a woman allegedly pretending to be a customer before a man shot him and handed over the firearm. Four ...

item.title: Asean meeting faces South China Sea tensions as US and China clash
item.description: The South China Sea rivalry between the United States and China threatens to overshadow the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (Asean) meeting, according to recent developments. US Secretary of St...

item.title: Marcos reaffirms Philippines' commitment to peace and sovereignty
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. emphasized the Philippines' unwavering commitment to peace, sovereignty, and national dignity during his speech at the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) Change of Co...

item.title: Internal strife in SAD (Punar Surjit) as leaders back Waris Punjab De, leading to Jhunda's expulsion

item.title: Italian airline expands flights to Tanzania, boosting tourism and economic ties
item.description: Italian airline Neos has launched scheduled flights to Kilimanjaro International Airport in northern Tanzania, marking a significant expansion of air connectivity between East Africa and European mark...

item.title: Philippines Prepares for Potential Cyclone as LPA Enters PAR
item.description: A low-pressure area (LPA) is expected to enter the Philippine area of responsibility (PAR) today and may develop into a tropical cyclone within 24 hours, according to PAGASA. The system, currently loc...

item.title: Canada proceeds with Gordie Howe bridge opening amid U.S. trade tensions
item.description: The federal government has confirmed it will proceed with the opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge on July 27, despite the absence of a cross-border ceremony with the United States. This de...

item.title: Oversight Judge Confirms Receipt of Complaints Against Idac Head
item.description: The office of the Idac oversight judge has confirmed receiving complaints against advocate Andrea Johnson, the head of the Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (Idac). This marks a departure f...
